task_completion.description: Log in to the OSCAR EMR system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule screen is visible, indicating successful login using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Access the chart for patient Eliseo Nader
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart, eChart, or demographic record specifically for 'Eliseo Nader' is open and visible on the screen.
The allergy addition window, popup, or specific section within Eliseo Nader's Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP) is open and ready for data entry.
The drug or allergen name 'Codeine' is typed into the appropriate input field in the allergy form.

task_completion.description: Enter the reaction and severity details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Nausea and vomiting' is entered into the reaction/notes field, and 'Moderate' is selected or entered in the severity field.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the allergy record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The allergy to 'Codeine' is visible as a saved, active entry in the patient's Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP) or allergy list, no longer just in an editable form.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the OSCAR EMR web interface in a web browser, without the use of terminal commands, curl, or direct database (MariaDB) queries to insert the record.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine application
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry occurs within the OSCAR EMR interface (URL: http://localhost:8080/oscar/...) and not in a text editor, notepad, or locally modified HTML file.

integrity.description: The record was actually saved, not just typed
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state shows the allergy record integrated into the patient's chart view (e.g., in a list or table of existing allergies), rather than just showing text typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Eliseo Nader. Allergen: Codeine. Reaction: Nausea and vomiting. Severity: Moderate. System: OSCAR EMR (Web interface at http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp). Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117. The allergy must be recorded in the patient's Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP) or allergy section.
